subcodes.first_line: O thou dear Son: Thy letter dated about one month ago was duly received today…. I have repeatedly written that any Persian - although he be my relative
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @growth of the Cause, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis
